intro.headline: Lass ma quatschen!
intro.introtext: Encourage people Ato contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you will add value to their projects through your work.

checkbox.label: I've read the privacy policy and agree to the processing of my data.

headline.text: What my colleagues say about me

ref1.name: Arno Nym
ref1.text: Hanna has proven to be a reliable group partner. His technical skills and proactive approach were crucial to the success of our project.

ref2.name: Max Mustermann
ref2.text: I had the good fortune of working with Hanna in a group project at the Developer Akademie that involved a lot of effort. He always stayed calm, cool, and focused, and made sure our team was set up for success. He's super knowledgeable, easy to work with, and I'd happily work with him again given the chance.

ref3.name: Lirum Larum
ref3.text: Our project benefited enormously from Simon efficient way of working.
